label: About The Event
title:
The World's First Live-Streamed
Reality Experience
description: EmpireX is where live streaming groups from around the world come together in luxury Airbnbs, settle group rivalries, create content, and party — all broadcasted LIVE on Kick to thousands of viewers. Compete for social influence and a CASH PRIZE across 5 unforgettable days in Florida.

details.heading: Where
details.body: Kissimmee, Florida & surrounding cities within a 15–30 mile radius

details.heading: Streaming Partner
details.body: Partnered with Kick — our first trip streaming live to thousands of viewers

details.heading: Access
details.body: Invite only. Follow @our.empire on Instagram to RSVP
